The '''giant thranta'''—not to be confused with the [[great thranta]]—was an oversized breed of [[common thranta]], otherwise identical in appearance to the smaller variety. It survived the destruction of [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]], its [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]], on [[Planet/Legends|planets]] such as [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]].

{{Creature-stub}}
